{{Quote|This shows that the cordon that Captain [Saul] Karath has thrown up is holding. It's only a matter of time before we begin pushing in the other direction.|Catronus Steffans, regarding this and other battles on Suurja|<ref name="taris" />}}
During the [[Mandalorian Wars]] in [[3964 BBY]], a '''battle''' occurred at the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Suurja]] between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Mandalorian Neo-Crusaders/Legends|Mandalorian Neo-Crusaders]]. As the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorians]] advanced toward the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]], [[Republic Navy/Legends|Republic Navy]] [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Saul Karath]] attempted to halt their advance at the [[Jebble-Vanquo-Tarnith line]], where Suurja was located. [[Second battle of Suurja|Two previous]] clashes at Suurja not long before were inconclusive—in a similar fashion, this battle also ended without a clear victor.

==Prelude==
In the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[3964 BBY]],<ref name="taris" /> the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] was embroiled in a major, [[The galaxy/Legends|galaxy]]-spanning conflict known as the [[Mandalorian Wars]]. Invading [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Mandalorian Neo-Crusaders/Legends|legions]] from the fringes of known [[Realspace/Legends|space]] conquered many [[Star system/Legends|systems]] on the edges of Republic control and put the Republic on the defensive, starting at the edges of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]].<ref name="nec">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> The Mandalorians swiftly progressed toward the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]], forcing [[Republic Navy/Legends|Republic Navy]] [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Saul Karath]] to establish a defensive cordon known as the [[Jebble-Vanquo-Tarnith line]]. The barrier was the site of heavy fighting in the [[Standard week/Legends|weeks]] to come, although the Mandalorians were not able to break through the Republic defenses. One of the [[Planet/Legends|worlds]] along the line was [[Suurja]], an [[Agriworld/Legends|agrarian]] planet with a population of 16 million colonists. About four [[Standard month/Legends|months]] after the Mandalorians' [[Battle of Flashpoint Station|capture]] of the Republic [[Flashpoint Stellar Research Station]], the Neo-Crusaders set their sights on Suurja. [[First battle of Suurja|Two]] [[Second battle of Suurja|previous]] clashes at Suurja between the Republic and Mandalorians were inconclusive, but both sides were still ready to fight.<ref name="taris" />

==The battle==
Republic [[Navy/Legends|naval]] forces, [[Commander/Legends|commanded]] by Saul Karath, soon battled the Mandalorians again for Suurja. However, similarly to the first two battles, neither side was able to obtain a conclusive advantage.<ref name="taris" />

==Aftermath==
Although the battle ended without a clear victor, both the Republic and Mandalorian forces were still strong enough to fight again. Within the next few weeks, the Republic and the Mandalorians engaged in [[Fourth battle of Suurja|another]] battle at Suurja. This and the other battles of Suurja were reported upon in an [[The Taris Holofeed: Prime Edition|edition]] of the [[Taris Holofeed]] news report from the nearby world [[Taris/Legends|Taris]]. In the release, Republic defense official [[Catronus Steffans]] was quoted as optimistically saying that the stalemate at Suurja represented a success of Karath's defensive cordon, and that it heralded an upcoming Republic pushback.<ref name="taris" />

==Behind the scenes==
The third battle of Suurja garnered its first, and thus far only, mention in ''[[The Taris Holofeed: Prime Edition]]'', a short postscript to the [[2006]] [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] [[Knights of the Old Republic 0|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 0]]. A short summary of this and other battles of Suurja is given, written by [[John Jackson Miller]], in the style of an [[in-universe]] news report.<ref name="taris" />
